chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Miqats for ʿumrah From Makkah and the Termination of the Talbiyah by the Performer of ʿumrah

text: 2958 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّهُ يَقْطَعُ اَلتَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا نَظَرَ إِلَى بُيُوتِ مَكَّةَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2958 - It was narrated:
"The Talbiyah should be discontinued when one sees the houses of Mecca."
